subcodes.title: Words to Mr Schwarz, spoken on 1913-04-03
subcodes.first_line: I hope that our happiness may last forever--that we may be together throughout all the realms of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: امیدوارم سُرور ما ابدی باشد در جمیع عوالم الهیه با هم باشیم در ظل عنایت حضرت بهآءالله
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
